title: Show and expand collapsed abstraction components
description: Make collapsed subgraph/zone abstraction components visually distinct and allow clicking one abstraction component to expand only that component while siblings remain collapsed.
decision_notes: Collapsed abstraction nodes now carry renderer metadata (`abstraction.target/id`) through layout and SVG.
SVG abstraction nodes render with `archmap-node-abstraction`, a heavier outline, bold label, pointer cursor, and `data-abstraction-key` such as `subgraph:Runtime` or `zone:service`.
Interactive renders attach a click handler for abstraction nodes. Clicking adds that key to the render state's expanded set and rerenders, leaving sibling abstractions collapsed.
Programmatic callers can pre-expand specific abstractions through `expandedAbstractions`.
notes: Browser automation was not retried deeply because the in-app browser connection had timed out in the prior turn. Port 4174 listeners remained present.
A future UX pass could add a visible collapse/reset control for already-expanded abstraction nodes.
